series_metadata.series_title: OH Employers EFT Quarterly Reconciliation of Income Tax Withheld
series_metadata.series_description: This form is used by Ohio Withholding agents to reconcile the withholdng payment made during each quarter vie Electronic Fund Transfer.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain in office files for 4 years from due date. If scanned, retain for 6 months. ; Electronic: Retain in office files for 4 years from due date., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
